name: nerilo
description: Firebase + WebRTC P2P 即時互動平台
//sdk: 可嵌入 SDK 公開出口（主入口 nerilo=純契約；turnkey 工廠在 nerilo/firestore）。JS 由 esbuild --splitting 產雙進入點；tsc 產 .d.ts 後由 prune-sdk-types 修剪為可達公開型別。

scripts.build:sdk: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('dist',{recursive:true,force:true})" && esbuild src/sdk/index.ts src/sdk/firestore.ts --bundle --splitting --format=esm --outdir=dist --packages=external && tsc -p tsconfig.sdk.json && node scripts/prune-sdk-types.mjs --max=30
scripts.example:minimal:build: npm run build:sdk && vite build --config examples/minimal-chat/vite.config.ts
scripts.test:all: npm run test:run && npm run test:integration
scripts.test:e2e:p0: firebase emulators:exec --only auth,firestore --project nerilo "playwright test tests/e2e/golden-path.spec.ts --reporter=list"
scripts.test:e2e:p1: firebase emulators:exec --only auth,firestore --project nerilo "playwright test tests/e2e/chat-flow.spec.ts tests/e2e/connection-states.spec.ts tests/e2e/multi-peer.spec.ts tests/e2e/refresh-recovery.spec.ts --reporter=list"
scripts.deploy: npm run build && firebase deploy --only hosting
scripts.deploy:hosting: npm run build && firebase deploy --only hosting
scripts.deploy:safe: npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run test:run && npm run deploy
scripts.deploy:staging: npm run build:staging && firebase hosting:channel:deploy staging --project staging --expires 30d
scripts.deploy:staging:safe: npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run test:run && npm run deploy:staging
scripts.deploy:production: npm run build:production && firebase deploy --only hosting --project production
scripts.deploy:production:safe: npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run test:run && npm run deploy:production
scripts.ci: npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run test:run
scripts.ci:full: npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run test:emulator
scripts.ci:fast: npm run type-check && npm run test:run
